<?php namespace Spatie\FlareClient\Http\Exceptions; use Exception; use Spatie\FlareClient\Http\Response; class BadResponseCode extends Exception { public Response $response; /** * @var array<int, mixed> */ public array $errors = []; public static function createForResponse(Response $response): self { $exception = new self(static::getMessageForResponse($response)); $exception->response = $response; $bodyErrors = isset($response->getBody()['errors']) ? $response->getBody()['errors'] : []; $exception->errors = $bodyErrors; return $exception; } public static function getMessageForResponse(Response $response): string { return "Response code {$response->getHttpResponseCode()} returned"; } }
